title: Comforting Australian Lentil Stew
description: A savory and fluffy one-pot Australian dish featuring plum jam, this stew is a perfect comfort food for any time of the year. It is also shojin-friendly, making it accessible to a wide range of diets.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the rinsed lentils, vegetable broth, tomato paste, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Stir in the plum jam and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the stew has thickened slightly.
Use a whisk to stir the stew and ensure that the flavors are well combined.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
